AI imageCaching is one of the most powerful techniques for building high-performance applications. Redis has become the de facto standard cache for modern Java microservices because it dramatically reduces database load and improves response times.
However, every experienced backend engineer eventually encounters three critical caching problems:

• Cache Penetration

• Cache Breakdown (Hot Key Breakdown)

• Cache Avalanche
These topics are among the most frequently asked Redis interview questions because they evaluate far more than your knowledge of Redis — they assess your understanding of distributed systems, scalability, and production-grade architecture.
In this article, we’ll explore each problem with real-world scenarios, interview-ready answers, practical solutions, and production best practices.
Why Do Interviewers Ask This Question?
When an interviewer asks about Redis caching problems, they are evaluating several important skills:

• Your understanding of distributed caching mechanisms
